item.title: X-23 - Cosplay

item.title: Pay the ferryman
item.description: To help with the confusion. Death and the ferryman are two different entities. Death collects the souls the ferryman ferrys the souls to there final destination. Think like the train conductor.

item.title: Sarah's Golden Smile after Winning Gold. :)
item.description: American wrestler Sarah Hildebrandt breaks through to win Olympic gold after falling short in 2020 “I love this sport,” Hildebrandt said after the win. “It’s so much fun. I’m going to smile as much as I can. I think I did a great job of that this week.” Known for her signature smile after matches, Hildebrandt’s exuberance after her victory was undeniable as she became the second member of the United States wrestling team to win gold after 20-year-old Amit Elor was the first on Tuesday at 68kg. https://www.mmafighting.com/2024/8/7/24215609/american-wrestler-sarah-hildebrandt-breaks-through-to-win-olympic-gold-medal-after-2020-bronze #olympics
item.dc:creator: Luvlyquants

item.title: Fully Custom Desk-PC: A Carpenters Masterpiece
item.description:
Custom watercooled pc in a wooden "enclosure"
Backside neatly cable managed
First test of the build, one LED strip dead
Close up of the system
Underside of the table
Top with cutout for the PC
3D printed grill with dustfilter, looking from above
Ait outtake, only grill
Intake with dustfilter
Frontside drawer
PC in the table with the glass lifted and the transportation handles mounted to the "enclosure"
Left side under the drawer is the power button
Opened drawer with wooden drawer slides running in ball bearings
Table frame with fully detachable connection for easier transportation
Sideview
Top with PC turned on
Finished build with peripherals
item.dc:creator: HerrCoroni

item.title: Ghostie

item.dc:creator: strawberrychocolatekisses

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1087 (human-like behavior)
item.description:
Good morning. I actually slept sorta well, despite waking up in the middle of a dream, so the world will find me especially problematic today. Let's get this bread.
I mean, I did get some anxiety in too. But the message of the dream was when someone offers me help, I should take it.
Especially hilarious because unlike some of my coworkers who also dress like cowboys, I carry a giant bowie knife instead of a gun. The knife is more useful for adjusting mirrors, anyway.
Gotta love a good Civ VI meme.
It's okay to seek help if you're contemplating suicide. People do love and care about you. Get help. The world would suck without your Meme posts. Survive, please.
Oops this is here twice
My coffee today is light roast, fair-trade, locally roasted coffee sourced from Rwanda and it is magical and delicious.
Elf is how you say 11 in German.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Good morning! Hey cutie! WHATDOIN?"
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.description: Wolverines from the Deadpool Wolverine movie

item.title: About damn time
item.description: Did a psych eval with new doc. Reaffirmed diagnoses of severe ADD, GED and depression. Taking antidepressant and anti anxiety meds and holy crap there’s a huge difference just a couple weeks in!

item.title: Amazon seems to have keyed into something about my shopping history…
item.description: And it’s relevant to THT! Edit: OPE! We hit Most Viral! Oh nooooo now I’ve gotta buy these things and post a photo wearing all of it (and a top, perverts). Stay tuned! Edit 2: All credit to my favorite @EmmAhGerd for suggesting I post the screenshot. She said she assumed it was a meme.

item.title: Images of Note: Poirot edition
item.description:
Yeah basically
My gran used to love Poirot
When it comes down to it, corporations don't care about the free market, they just wanna increase their power without state oversight.
I mean basically
:O
IT SITS
treet?
Even in the future, they use Arch btw
:D
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: I... I'm lost.
item.description: I don't want to tell anyone I know. I'm quite scared. Doctor's appointment on Monday to get more details. His quote, "I hate working when I'm dying." Hmmmm. Fuck. FP Edit: Thank you for the support and well-wishes, truly. It helps a bit to compartmentalize my emotions within this app for now so I can be calm for him and the kids and finish my workday from bed. His appetite has been bad for a while. First go-around was stomach cancer, I don't have details about physiology for this relapse until Monday. But if anyone has any recommendations on solutions that might get him eating a little bit more regularly, they would be greatly appreciated. Peace, yall. Fuck cancer.
item.dc:creator: TheGoudaKaramazov
